case_title: MICHELLE CHEN VS. FSY EMPIRE PARTNERS,LP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE CHEN APPEARED.
